title: Equivalent Exchange 2
description: Allows you to transmute tons of materials into other materials and adds "endgame content" to make you feel more godlike in your sandbox world.
body:
### This mod is abandoned and has been uploaded for archival purposes. It was [originally created](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1282288-1-2-5-equivalent-exchange-2-v1-4-6-7) around 2012 by [MercuriusXeno](https://twitter.com/MercuriusXeno) and later, [Pahimar](https://github.com/pahimar). It has been uploaded to Modrinth under the ModrinthArchives account with permission from the original author.

[![Twitter screenshot showing permission to upload](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B7nASDS6/images/9637cfc75080253e3b2bdb76eafcbd14182d914b.png)](https://twitter.com/MercuriusXeno/status/1531861061665804290)

![EE2 Logo Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B7nASDS6/images/8d72a92d7af36efb671a94a8d3bb9ae552eaca7e.png)

# Equivalent Exchange 2
To summarize: this mod allows you to transmute tons of materials into other materials. It adds a lot of what is classified by many as "endgame content", to make you feel more godlike in your sandbox world. If this offends your Minecrafting sensibilities, this may not be the mod for you.

These items are psychotically expensive, so before you bash them, try acquiring the items legitimately. You'll find it's not exactly a cakewalk.

## Installation

### Client (for Minecraft 1.2.5)
1. Install the required version of ModLoader in to your minecraft.jar
2. Remove META-INF from your minecraft.jar
3. Install the required version of Forge in to you minecraft.jar
4. Put EE2ClientV####.jar in to your /mods folder
5. Load up Minecraft and play!

### Server (for Minecraft 1.2.5)
1. Install the required version of Forge in to you minecraft.jar
2. Place the downloaded EE2ServerV####.jar (#### being the version number of EE2 that you downloaded) into the /mods in your Minecraft server directory
3. Start up your Minecraft server and play!

## Donations
If you enjoy the mod, or any of Pahimar's work, and feel like you'd like to help out with some monetary support, my request is that you donate to one of the many amazing charities out there. Charities such as [Extra Life](https://www.extra-life.org/), [Child's Play](https://www.childsplaycharity.org/), [Kid's Help Phone](https://kidshelpphone.ca/), and the [Canadian Diabetes Association](https://www.diabetes.ca/). Any of these organizations would put your support to excellent use.

## Changelog
<details>
<summary>Equivalent Exchange 2: Changelog</summary>

### 1.4.6.7:
**For:** Minecraft v1.2.5  
**Required:** Minecraft Forge v3.3.8.152

- Bugfix: Updated to the new NEI 1.3 API, fixes the EE2-NEI plugin.
- Added: Option in mod_EE.props to enable/disable the EE2-NEI plugin (EnableNEIPlugin). Set to 1 if you want it enabled, 0 if you want it disabled.

1.4.6.6:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Minecraft Forge v3.3.8.152

	Bugfix: Removed the Forestry API from the EE jar in favor of a Reflection based addon. Should work better when the API changes.

1.4.6.5:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Minecraft Forge v3.3.7.135

	Change: Removed the ability to repair RP2 handsaws with Covalence Dust to prevent a dupe exploit

1.4.6.4:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Minecraft Forge v3.3.7.135

	Revert: Backed out fix for Transmutation Table not working in worlds other than the Overworld - didn't work!

1.4.6.3:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Minecraft Forge v3.3.7.135

	Bugfix: Possible fix to the Transmutation Table lag issue (reduced the number of times a second it scans for changes)
	Bugfix: Possible fix to the Transmutation Table not working in worlds other than the Overworld
	Bugfix: Fix stack overflow when transmuting large sets of trees. Changed the Philosopher Stone to only change one block at a time

1.4.6.2:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Minecraft Forge v3.3.7.135

	Bugfix: NEI-EE2 Tooltip will now accurately show the currently stored EMC in a Klein Star
	Change: Nerfed the EMC value of IC2 Uranium (Was: 49152, Now: 4096)

1.4.6.1:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Minecraft Forge v3.2.6.131

	Bugfix: Better MystCraft support for EE2 in SMP (should no longer crash, thanks xcompwiz!)

1.4.6.0:
	*** Note - As of Minecraft Forge 3.2.3.110 you no longer need Risugami's ModLoader (It's still compatible with Forge however) ***
	*** Note 2 - If you are getting errors with NEI (crashing) make sure you are using NEI v1.2.2.4. There is a bug in NEI v1.2.2.3 (and earlier) that causes it to crash with EE2 v1.4.6.0 ***
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Minecraft Forge v3.2.5.120

	Bugfix: EMC exploit with Vanilla Minecraft Fireball Charges
	Bugfix: Mercurial Eye can now properly use the various wooden planks
	Bugfix: Some better null protection on Loot Balls
	Change: Nerfed the size of Pillar Mode on the Mercurial Eye (Was: HUGE, Now: 3/6/9/12 depending on charge level)
	Change: Nerfed the EMC value of BuildCraft Oil Buckets (Was: 17152, Now: 2816)
	Added: EE2-NEI tooltip helper - If you have NEI installed you can mouse over items to see their EMC values
	Added: EE2-NEI crafting overlay - The Philosopher's Stone crafting grid now can show the NEI recipe overlay
	Added: Ability to disable the Transmutation Table/Tablet in SMP (in mod_EE.props on the server set 'AllowTransmutationTable' to 0)


1.4.5.1:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.5, and Minecraft Forge v3.1.3.*

	Bugfix: Loot Balls now properly "open up" when sucked into Alchemy Bags, Condensers, or Alchemical Chests with a Black Hole Band or Void Ring
	Bugfix: Updated the included Forestry API (Forestry v1.4.6.0)
	Added: EE2 will now check your version of Minecraft Forge against the minimum required, and will exit with an error message if you need to update it

1.4.5.0:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.5, and Minecraft Forge v3.1.3.*

	Bugfix: Loot Balls drastically improved; should no longer have ghost Loot Balls, and Loot Balls work much better with mods that utilize IPickupHandler (ie, Forestry)
	Change: Dropped Audiomod requirement for EE2's custom sounds to work
	Change: Installation process - only need to place the EE2Client jar in your /mods to install EE2 now

1.4.4.1:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.5, Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.5, and Minecraft Forge v3.1.3.*
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.5 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Change: EMC values for Clay Balls (Was: 64, Now: 16) and Clay Blocks (Was: 256, Now: 64)
	Change: EMC values for Bones (Was: 96, Now: 144) and Bone Meal (Was: 32, Now: 48)
	Added: EMC value for Buildcraft Oil Buckets (equal to 1 Iron Bucket + 2 Diamonds). Considered a Fuel.
	Added: EMC value for IndustrialCraft2 Uranium (equal to 6 Diamonds). Considered a Fuel.

1.4.4.0:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.5, and Minecraft Forge v3.1.2.90
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.5 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Misc: Re-implemented SMP for EE2 using Forge ModLoader
	Bugfix: Mercurial Eye's target slot will now only accept items with defined EMC values
	Bugfix: Shift-clicking items into the Transmutation Table no longer crashes the game
	Bugfix: EE2 machines (Collectors, Relays, Condenser, Furnaces) now face their proper directions in SMP
	Bugfix: Pedestals not displaying the current item in SMP
	Bugfix: Transmutation Table will now always display the targeted item in the top output slot if you have enough EMC to retrieve it
	Change: EMC value for the Dragon Egg changed (Was: equal to 1 Diamond Block, Now: equal to 1 Dark Matter)
	Added: EMC values for Iron Shears (equal to 2 Iron Ingots), Saddles (equal to 3 Leather), and Music Discs (equal to 1 Gold Ingot)

1.4.3.1:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.5, and Minecraft Forge v3.0.0.72
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.5 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Bugfix: Updated the included Forestry API (Forestry v1.4.4.0)

1.4.3.0:
	*** Note - This is only a SSP update ***
	For: Minecraft v1.2.5
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.5, and Minecraft Forge v3.0.0.72
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.5 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Misc: Updated to Minecraft v1.2.5
	Misc: Dropped dependency on SDK's ModLoaderMP
	Bugfix: Fixed slab EMC exploit for all but stone slabs (cannot have EMC values < 1)
	Added: New wooden planks/sandstone blocks added in MC v1.2.4 can now be learned in the Transmutation Table

1.4.2.0:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.4
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.4, SDK's ModLoaderMP 1.2.4 v1, and Minecraft Forge v2.0.0.67
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.4 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Misc: Updated to Minecraft v1.2.4

1.4.1.5:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.3
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.3, SDK's ModLoaderMP 1.2.3 v3, and Minecraft Forge v1.4.1.59
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.3 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Bugfix: Breaking a Condenser no longer crashes the game
	Bugfix: Klein Stars can now be placed in the Transmutation Table again
	Bug: Transmutation Table does not work in the Nether/The End in SMP (no known fix at this time)

1.4.1.4:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.3
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.3, SDK's ModLoaderMP 1.2.3 v3, and Minecraft Forge v1.4.1.59
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.3 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Bugfix: Transmutation Table will now eject items at the player's location
	Bugfix: Alchemical Chests/Condensers when destroyed will now respect items NBT data (enchantments, etc)
	Bugfix: Optimized the loading of addon modules further
	Bugfix: Forestry addon now loads properly in SMP
	Change: New Red Matter Furnace recipe (Dark Matter Furnace in the middle with Red Matter on it's left, right, and top sides)
	Added: EMC mapping for RP2 Indigo Flowers/Dye (same as normal flowers/dyes)

1.4.1.3:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.3
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.3, SDK's ModLoaderMP 1.2.3 v3, and Minecraft Forge v1.4.1.59
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.3 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Bugfix: Fixed Philosopher Stone staying in Crafting Grid again (missed it in EE2 v1.4.1.2)

1.4.1.2:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.3
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.3, SDK's ModLoaderMP 1.2.3 v3, and Minecraft Forge v1.4.1.59
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.3 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Misc: Updated to Forge v1.4.1.59
	Bugfix: Transmutation Table will now eject items upon closing the GUI
	Bugfix: Transmutation Table will now log where it ejects player's items (helps me troubleshoot the bug)
	Bugfix: Fixed DM/RM armor not providing adequate protection
	Bugfix: Fixed Relay Mk1's EMC value
	Change: EMC mapping for Dragon Egg (equal to 1 Diamond Block)

1.4.1.1:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.3
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.3, SDK's ModLoaderMP 1.2.3 v3, and Minecraft Forge v1.4.0.46
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.3 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Bugfix: Philosopher Stone now properly stays in the Crafting Grid after crafting (thanks Eloraam!)

1.4.1.0:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.3
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.3, SDK's ModLoaderMP 1.2.3 v3, and Minecraft Forge v1.4.0.46
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.3 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Added: Forestry Addon
	Added: EMC values for Apatite, Forestry Copper Ingots, Forestry Tin Ingots, and Forestry Bronze Ingots
	Added: DM/RM tools right-click function now work with Forestry ores (Apatite, Copper, Tin)

1.4.0.4:
	For: Minecraft v1.2.3
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.2.3, SDK's ModLoaderMP 1.2.3 v3, and Minecraft Forge v1.4.0.46
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.2.3 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Bugfix: Updated the version number to the correct version
	Bugfix: Removed the stubbed in "EE Portal Device" so that it would no longer display in NEI/TMI/Creative Mode
	Bugfix: Fixed Collector target slot dupe exploit
	Bugfix: Fixed Collector Mk2's unable to accumulate more than 3,000 latent EMC
	Bugfix: Fixed crash bug where players place an EE block at y=1
	Bugfix: Fixed a Null Pointer Exception when using Buildcraft to extract items from a Condenser
	Change: Relay Mk1 recipe changed (replace the Collector Mk1 with a Diamond Block)
	Change: New Red Matter recipe (Was: 1 Dark Matter + 8 Aeternalis Fuel, Now: 3 Dark Matter + 6 Aeternalis Fuel)
	Change: Collector Mk3's speed buffed to reflect the new EMC of Red Matter
	Change: Relay Mk3's speed and relay bonus buffed to reflect the new EMC of Red Matter
	Change: Updated the Philosopher's Stone ability to transmute mobs to include the new mobs from MC v1.0 onwards
	Change: Switched from the BC 2.x API to the BC 3.x API
	Change: Modified loading of addon modules to be more efficient
	Added: EMC values for Nether Brick Fence, Nether Brick Stairs, Ferns, Grass, End Stone

1.39:
	*** Note - This was a backport update from EE2 v1.4.0.3 for Minecraft 1.1 ***
	For: Minecraft v1.1
	Required: Risugami's ModLoader v1.1, Flan's ModLoaderMP 1.1 v2.1, and Minecraft Forge v1.3.3.12
	Recommended: (Client only) Risugami's Audiomod v1.1 (for EE2 custom sounds)
	
	Bugfix: Updated the version number to the correct version
	Bugfix: Removed the stubbed in "EE Portal Device" so that it would no longer display in NEI/TMI/Creative Mode
	Bugfix: Fixed Collector target slot dupe exploit
	Bugfix: Fixed Collector Mk2's unable to accumulate more than 3,000 latent EMC
	Bugfix: Fixed crash bug where players place an EE block at y=1
	Bugfix: Fixed a Null Pointer Exception when using Buildcraft to extract items from a Condenser
	Change: Relay Mk1 recipe changed (replace the Collector Mk1 with a Diamond Block)
	Change: New Red Matter recipe (Was: 1 Dark Matter + 8 Aeternalis Fuel, Now: 3 Dark Matter + 6 Aeternalis Fuel)
	Change: Collector Mk3's speed buffed to reflect the new EMC of Red Matter
	Change: Relay Mk3's speed and relay bonus buffed to reflect the new EMC of Red Matter
	Change: Updated the Philosopher's Stone ability to transmute mobs to include the new mobs from MC v1.0 onwards
	Change: Switched from the BC 2.x API to the BC 3.x API
	Change: Modified loading of addon modules to be more efficient
	Added: EMC values for Nether Brick Fence, Nether Brick Stairs, Ferns, Grass, End Stone
</details>
